# AppTechno

> AppTechno is a software company that builds AI-powered and privacy-first web tools and apps. Core features are free — optional Pro plans for power users.

## Available Apps

### CVwise — AI Job Application Suite (CV Builder + Optimizer + Cover Letter)
**URL**: https://cvwise.apptechno.net

CVwise is a complete AI-powered job application suite. Two starting points:
1. **CV Builder (beta)**: Create a professional CV from scratch in 5 guided steps — personal info, work experience, education, skills & languages, and a live preview. Save up to 5 CV drafts. Send directly to the AI Optimizer.
2. **Upload existing CV**: Upload a PDF or DOCX file — AI extracts all sections automatically, including multi-column layouts and scanned PDFs.

Then: paste any job posting URL from LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, Greenhouse, Lever, or Workday — or paste job text directly — and Claude AI (Anthropic) rewrites your CV to match the role.

**Full feature set**: ATS keyword match scoring, CV Builder (create from scratch), PDF + DOCX export, AI cover letter generation (Problem-Solution framework, Pro), Harvard OCS CV format, AI chat edit (Pro, 20/month), CV version history (up to 10 versions), multi-language (8 languages: EN, TR, DE, FR, NL, SV, AR, RU), PWA — installable on mobile and desktop.

**Free plan**: 3 AI optimizations/month, PDF export, job URL scraping, ATS score.
**Pro**: $11.99/mo · $99.99/yr · $279.99/3yr — 50 optimizations, DOCX export, cover letter AI, chat edit, version history, 1 ad only.

**Who uses it**: Job seekers at all career stages — recent graduates, career changers, software engineers, financial analysts (FP&A, investment banking, CFO), HR professionals, marketing managers, data scientists, product managers, consultants (McKinsey/BCG Harvard format), healthcare professionals.

**Keywords**: CV optimizer, resume optimizer, ATS optimization, AI resume builder, CV builder from scratch, cover letter AI, Harvard CV method, CV preparation, applicant tracking system, HR tech, financial analyst resume, FP&A resume, investment banking CV, Jobscan alternative, Zety alternative, create CV online, professional resume maker

---

### DocWise — Privacy-First PDF & Document Toolbox
**URL**: https://docwise.apptechno.net

Merge, split, compress PDFs, convert images to PDF, extract text with OCR, and bulk rename files — all processed locally in the browser using WebAssembly. No file uploads, no data collection. Tools: Merge PDF, Split PDF, Compress PDF, Image to PDF, OCR (8 languages), Bulk Rename, Document Compare.

**Who uses it**: HR teams (merge candidate CVs, compress onboarding docs), Finance (merge bank statements, scan invoices), Legal (merge contracts, extract text from scanned filings), Administrators, Students.

**Keywords**: merge PDF, compress PDF, OCR text extraction, free PDF tools, document management, HR document tool, legal document merge, invoice scanner, iLovePDF alternative, Smallpdf alternative, privacy PDF

**Pricing**: Free (3 ops/day) · Pro ~$6.99/year (unlimited)

---

### BudgetWise — Personal Budget Tracker & Finance Planner
**URL**: https://budgetwise.apptechno.net

Free personal budget tracker. Track income and expenses by category, scan receipts with OCR, plan monthly budgets, compare budget vs actual, and forecast year-end finances. Multi-language (6 languages), multi-currency (30+), PWA.

**Who uses it**: Employees, freelancers, self-employed, families, finance professionals, students, expats.

**Keywords**: budget tracker, expense tracker, personal finance app, monthly budget planner, receipt scanner, financial forecasting, Mint alternative, YNAB alternative, household budget, cash flow tracker, savings planner

**Pricing**: Free (with ads) · Premium $12.99/year or $18.99/2 years

---

### File Consolidator — Batch File Merger
**URL**: https://fileconsolidator.apptechno.net

Merge multiple CSV and Excel files into one spreadsheet. Combine PDF files and images into a single PDF. 100% local browser processing. Free, no account required.

---

## Company Values

- **Privacy First**: Local processing where possible, minimal data collection
- **Free to Use**: Core features always free, optional Pro plans for power users
- **Works Everywhere**: Fully responsive — desktop, tablet, mobile, PWA installable
- **AI-Powered**: Using Anthropic Claude (Haiku + Sonnet) for high-quality AI features
- **Secure**: Supabase RLS, no third-party data sharing

## Technology Stack

- Apps built with Next.js (14/15/16), React, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI
- Hosted on Vercel (apps) and Cloudflare Pages (static sites)
- AI: Anthropic Claude API (Haiku for fast tasks, Sonnet for quality)
- Auth & Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL with Row Level Security)
- Payments: Stripe recurring subscriptions

## Key URLs

- AppTechno homepage: https://apptechno.net
- CVwise: https://cvwise.apptechno.net
- DocWise: https://docwise.apptechno.net
- BudgetWise: https://budgetwise.apptechno.net
- File Consolidator: https://fileconsolidator.apptechno.net
